Video.summary: A West Point graduate has trouble adjusting to an Army unit in the West.
Video.title: Lieutenant Bungle

Video.summary: Two outlaws set upon Maggie Woolf and her father who are taking refuge from a storm.
Video.title: Storm Over Truckee

Video.summary: A mine cave-in alters a rivalry between two men over the affections of a woman.
Video.title: The Watch

Video.summary: A reporter probes reports that a general is selling guns to Natives in exchange for their property.
Video.title: The Truth Teller

Video.summary: Fred Curry and Jesse Blount feud after they each file claims to the same mine.
Video.title: Feud at Dome Rock

Video.summary: A lawyer who has turned to the bottle is ostracized when he refuses to help a miner.
Video.title: Justice at Jackson Creek

Video.summary: The story of Amadeo Giannini and the creation of the Bank of America.
Video.title: The Unshakable Man

Video.summary: Sante Fe faces an invasion by the American army and it's citizens are forced south.
Video.title: La Tules

Video.summary: A criminal sentenced to hang invents a complicated omelet to delay his execution.
Video.title: The Hangtown Fry

Video.summary: A town boss makes trouble for a farmer.
Video.title: The Last Shot

Video.summary: Plagued by gold thefts, Denver bankers set up their own mint in the bank basement.
Video.title: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Image.alt: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Video.summary: An outlaw and teamster help miners.
Video.title: The Debt

Video.summary: Johnny Ringo is an expert gunslinger with a mysterious past; his arrival in town brings concern.
Video.title: The Melancholy Gun

Video.summary: In 1862 Utah, the employees of a stagecoach depot encounter an orphaned Native boy.
Video.title: Little Cayuse

Video.summary: As survivors of the Donner Party recuperate, William Eddy grieves the loss of his wife and children.
Video.title: The Hastings Cut-off

Video.summary: A man's resemblance to a killer lands him in jail and facing a murder charge.
Video.title: Alias James Stuart

Video.summary: A man who claims he can resurrect the dead poses a problem for killer Bill Groat.
Video.title: Miracle at Boot Hill

Video.summary: The emperor of Brazil finds himself stranded in the countryside and unable to prove his identity.
Video.title: A Kingdom for a Horse

Video.summary: A minister has ambitious, but not very popular, plans of building a church in Whiskey Gulch.
Video.title: Miracle at Whiskey Gulch

Video.summary: Jeremy is a crew member on a blackbirding ship that inhumanely captures and enslaves native peoples.
Video.title: Showdown at Kamaaina Flats

Video.summary: A father outsmarts a wily Indian.
Video.title: The Lucky Cow

Video.summary: A kindhearted saloon singer nurses a gunfighter back to health.
Video.title: The Left Hand Is Damned

Video.summary: A lawman must choose between love and duty in the midst of a missing persons case.
Video.title: There Was Another Dalton Brother

Video.summary: A former Confederate officer tries to help the family of a soldier killed in battle.
Video.title: Paid in Full

Video.summary: A petty drunk transporting a new church bell to Volcano, Calif., decides to sell it off instead.
Video.title: A Bell for Volcano

Video.summary: Native brothers must find a tribal renegade.
Video.title: Death in the Desert

Video.summary: A besieged banker devises a way to get gold.
Video.title: Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Image.alt: Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint
Raid on the San Francisco Mint

Video.summary: Ronald Reagan plays a sheriff who tries enforcing the law without a gun.
Video.title: No Gun Behind His Badge

Video.summary: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego.
Video.title: A City Is Born

Video.summary: Mormon emigrant Jessica Scott loses her baby in unknown territory while traveling to Utah.
Video.title: The Red Shawl

Video.summary: A freight hauler marries a rich girl by mistake and has a week to court her before it is annulled.
Video.title: The Courtship of Carrie Huntington

Video.summary: Huldah Swanson is traveling west to meet her fiancé with $1000 sewn in her hat.
Video.title: The Hat That Huldah Wore

Video.summary: A priest claims the marriages in a town are void.
Video.title: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Image.alt: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Video.summary: While serving as scouts, Carson and Godey come across a man who lost everything in a Native raid.
Video.title: Samaritans, Mountain Style

Video.summary: After a settler's son is taken during an Apache raid, an Army doctor leads a small band for rescue.
Video.title: The Hero of Apache Pass

Video.summary: An ex-convict is hired by Animas City to be their marshal.
Video.title: Halo for a Badman

Video.summary: In the new state of New Mexico, a young woman decides to challenge the servitude system in court.
Video.title: Along Came Mariana

Video.summary: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.
Video.title: A Man Called Abraham

Video.summary: A recruit and his pet mule are the only hope for a besieged cavalry patrol.
Video.title: Honor the Name Dennis Driscoll

Video.summary: A rivalry over a pretty woman inadvertently causes trouble between cavalrymen and Natives.
Video.title: The Hero of Fort Halleck

Video.summary: After her father is jailed for contempt of court, Kate Melville takes over his job as sheriff.
Video.title: Kate Melville and the Law

Video.summary: A psychic leads the way to rescue ambush survivors.
Video.title: The Man Who Wouldn't Die

Video.summary: Prospector Jim Otis is taken hostage by robbers after he stumbles onto their loot.
Video.title: Solid Foundation
